languages.text: {n}Зеленые глаза мужчины расширяются. Звериная ярость уступает место иному, более глубокому чувству. Он разжимает стальную хватку и делает шаг назад.{/n}
{n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Зеленые глаза мужчины расширяются. Звериная ярость уступает место иному, более глубокому чувству. Он разжимает стальную хватку и делает шаг назад.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}
{n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}
{n}Unable to withstand your pressure, the colonel releases you and rolls to the side. But he takes a little longer to catch his breath than you do.{/n}
{n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}
{n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}
{n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの圧力に耐えきれず、大佐は手を離して横へ転がる。だが、息を整えるのはあなたより少し遅い。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Unable to withstand your pressure, the colonel releases you and rolls to the side. But he takes a little longer to catch his breath than you do.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの圧力に耐えきれず、大佐は手を離して横へ転がる。だが、息を整えるのはあなたより少し遅い。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Il écarquille ses yeux d'un vert profond, et sa rage bestiale laisse place à quelque chose de plus ancré en lui. Il relâche son étreinte, puis recule d'un pas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Il écarquille ses yeux d'un vert profond, et sa rage bestiale laisse place à quelque chose de plus ancré en lui. Il relâche son étreinte, puis recule d'un pas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yeşil gözleri fal taşı gibi açılıyor. Vahşi öfke yerini başka, daha derin bir hisse bırakıyor. Demir gibi tutuşunu gevşetip bir adım geri çekiliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yeşil gözleri fal taşı gibi açılıyor. Vahşi öfke yerini başka, daha derin bir hisse bırakıyor. Demir gibi tutuşunu gevşetip bir adım geri çekiliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seine grünen Augen weiten sich. Wilder Zorn weicht einem anderen, tieferen Gefühl. Er lockert seinen eisernen Griff und tritt einen Schritt zurück.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seine grünen Augen weiten sich. Wilder Zorn weicht einem anderen, tieferen Gefühl. Er lockert seinen eisernen Griff und tritt einen Schritt zurück.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sus ojos verdes se abren de par en par. La furia salvaje da paso a una sensación más profunda. Suelta su agarre de hierro y da un paso atrás.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sus ojos verdes se abren de par en par. La furia salvaje da paso a una sensación más profunda. Suelta su agarre de hierro y da un paso atrás.{/n}

languages.text: {n}他绿色的眼睛睁大了。那股野兽般的狂怒，渐渐被另一种更深沉的情绪取代。他松开铁钳般的双臂，向后退了一步。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}His green eyes widen. Feral rage gives way to another, deeper feeling. He releases his iron grip and takes a step back.{/n}
